surface: plan §9.3 N7 / §10 S1: task slugs carrying shell/branch metacharacters — a slug becomes a branch name and worktree path, so it MUST be slugified (argument-array invocation, never string-interpolated into a shell). slugify_task collapses every non-[a-z0-9] run to a hyphen; the fixture asserts the dangerous chars are gone.
goal: a plan whose task ids try to smuggle shell metacharacters into branch names and worktree paths
note: expected_after_slugify is what shared.fleet.dispatch.slugify_task must produce (48-char cap, trailing hyphens trimmed). The rig proves no metacharacter survives into a branch/path.
